name: provenance manifest pr_corpus_state per-source patterns_consulted must be an array
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && printf '{"pr_corpus_state":{"x":{"patterns_consulted":"not-an-array"}}}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/compliance/validate-consumption-schema.sh" --manifest .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc.json --check patterns-array 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid_patterns_consulted_type' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
